Title: Cart Page — Coupon Sidebar Shows Preset Coupon Cards from promotionCoupons Query
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- At least 1 product added to cart
- At least 1 public active promotion with a coupon code exists in the store
- User is on the cart page
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to the cart page at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] browser_snapshot to confirm cart page is loaded with cart items
[ASSERT] Verify the coupons/discounts sidebar section (.coupons-section or equivalent) is visible on the cart page
[ASSERT] Verify preset coupon cards are rendered inside the sidebar section — each card shows at minimum: promotion name or description and a coupon code button
[ASSERT] Verify the coupon code {{couponCode}} is visible on one of the preset cards
[ASSERT] Verify "Discount & coupons" heading or equivalent label is present above the sidebar
Assertions:
[DOM] Coupon sidebar section rendered on cart page with at least 1 preset coupon card (VCST-4896 new feature)
[DOM] Each preset card shows promotion name/description and a clickable coupon code or "Apply" button
[STATE] promotionCoupons GraphQL query was fired with correct storeId and userId to populate the cards
[STATE] Only public active promotions with coupon codes are shown (no automatic-only promotions)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] promotionCoupons GraphQL request fired with storeId={{STORE_ID}} and authenticated userId; response contains the coupon shown in sidebar
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during cart page load
Failure_Signals: coupon sidebar section absent from cart page (VCST-4896 regression); preset coupon cards not rendered despite active public coupons existing; sidebar shows spinner indefinitely; promotionCoupons request not fired; 4xx/5xx on promotionCoupons query

Title: Cart Page — Clicking Preset Coupon Card Apply Button Applies Coupon and Shows Discount
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- At least 1 product added to cart
- At least 1 public active percentage or fixed-amount coupon exists
- Cart page is loaded with preset coupon cards visible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to cart page at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify preset coupon cards are visible in the sidebar
[ACT] browser_click the "Apply" button (or coupon code button) on the preset card for {{couponCode}}
[WAIT] Wait for cart total to update
[ASSERT] browser_snapshot to confirm coupon applied state
[ASSERT] Verify a discount line item appears in the cart totals area
[ASSERT] Verify the coupon code is shown in the applied coupons list (within cart or sidebar)
[ASSERT] Verify cart total is reduced by the discount amount
Assertions:
[DOM] Cart totals section shows discount line item after coupon applied
[DOM] Applied coupon code visible in the coupon applied area
[MATH] Cart total = subtotal - discount (correct calculation)
[STATE] BL-CART-003: discount applied to effective (possibly sale) price, not list price
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] addCoupon GraphQL mutation fires with correct couponCode, storeId, userId; mutation returns errors[]=[] and updated cart
[NETWORK] Cart re-fetch or mutation response shows updated discountTotal and total
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during coupon application
Failure_Signals: preset card "Apply" button not clickable (VCST-4896 regression); coupon applied but discount line item absent from totals; cart total unchanged after coupon applied; addCoupon mutation returns errors[]; toast/error shown despite valid coupon
Cleanup: Remove applied coupon via trash icon or navigate away from cart

Title: Cart Page — Removing Applied Coupon via Sidebar Restores Original Cart Total
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- At least 1 product added to cart
- A coupon has been applied to the cart (state from CPN-055 or apply any valid coupon first)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to cart page at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] Apply coupon {{couponCode}} if not already applied (click preset card Apply button)
[ASSERT] Confirm cart total is discounted
[ASSERT] Capture the original (pre-discount) subtotal value for comparison
[ACT] browser_click the remove/trash icon next to the applied coupon in the sidebar or cart totals
[WAIT] Wait for cart to recalculate
[ASSERT] browser_snapshot to capture post-removal state
[ASSERT] Verify discount line item is gone from cart totals
[ASSERT] Verify cart total equals the original subtotal (discount fully reversed)
Assertions:
[DOM] Discount line item absent from cart totals after coupon removal
[MATH] Cart total restored to original subtotal (+ tax/shipping if applicable) after removal
[STATE] Applied coupon indicator/badge cleared from sidebar
[DOM] Preset coupon card for the removed coupon reappears or re-enables in the sidebar
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] removeCoupon GraphQL mutation fires with couponCode, storeId, userId; mutation returns updated cart with discountTotal=0 for that coupon
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during coupon removal
Failure_Signals: coupon remove button not visible or not clickable; cart total unchanged after removal; discount persists after removal (removeCoupon mutation not fired); cart shows 0 total after removal (over-correction); coupon card does not reappear in sidebar after removal
Cleanup: Navigate away from cart; ensure cart is empty or reset for next test

Title: Cart Page — Expired Coupon Not Shown in Sidebar Preset Cards
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- At least 1 product added to cart
- At least 1 EXPIRED coupon exists (endDate in the past)
- At least 1 ACTIVE coupon exists (to confirm sidebar is populated)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to cart page at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify the coupon sidebar section is visible
[ASSERT] Verify at least 1 active coupon card is shown ({{activeCouponCode}} is present)
[ASSERT] Verify the expired coupon {{expiredCouponCode}} is NOT present in the preset cards list
[ASSERT] Scan the full sidebar card list to confirm no expired/inactive coupon codes are displayed
Assertions:
[DOM] Expired coupon card absent from cart sidebar preset cards list
[DOM] Active valid coupons ARE shown (sidebar not blank)
[STATE] BL-PRICE-002: expired promotions are excluded from promotionCoupons query response; no expired codes rendered in sidebar
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] promotionCoupons GraphQL response does not contain the expired coupon entry; active coupon IS in response
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: expired coupon appears in sidebar preset cards (BL-PRICE-002 violation); sidebar shows no cards at all when only expired coupons exist but active coupons are also present; expired coupon code can be applied via Apply button

Title: Cart Page — Unauthenticated User Does Not See Preset Coupon Cards in Sidebar
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNOUT]
- Cart has at least 1 product (anonymous cart)
- Public active coupons exist in the store
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to cart page at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart as an anonymous (signed-out) user
[ASSERT] browser_snapshot to capture anonymous cart page
[ASSERT] Verify the coupons sidebar section is either: (a) absent, (b) shows a sign-in CTA, or (c) shows a manual code entry only — but does NOT show preset coupon cards
[ASSERT] Verify no promotionCoupons GraphQL request is fired for an anonymous user (or if fired, userId is absent/null)
Assertions:
[DOM] No preset coupon cards rendered for unauthenticated user (cards require user identity)
[STATE] If coupon input is shown, it is a manual code entry field, not preset cards from promotionCoupons
[STATE] No data scope leak: authenticated promotionCoupons results not exposed to anonymous session
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] promotionCoupons not called with a real userId for anonymous user; if called, userId parameter is absent or null
[CONSOLE] no JS errors or auth-related GraphQL errors during anonymous cart view
Failure_Signals: preset coupon cards visible for anonymous user (data scope leak); promotionCoupons called with hardcoded or leaked userId for anonymous session; page shows 401/403 error instead of graceful no-cards state
Cleanup: No cleanup needed for anonymous session

Title: Cart Sidebar — Percentage Coupon Applied to Sale Price, Not List Price (BL-CART-003)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Product with an active sale price (salePrice < listPrice) added to cart
- A percentage discount coupon exists and is available in sidebar preset cards
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to cart page at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify cart item shows sale price (not list price) in the cart line item
[ASSERT] Capture the displayed sale price value for computation reference
[ACT] Apply coupon {{couponCode}} via the sidebar preset card Apply button
[WAIT] Wait for cart recalculation
[ASSERT] Verify the discount amount equals the coupon percentage applied to the SALE price (not the list price)
[ASSERT] Verify final cart total = sale price - discount (not list price - discount)
Assertions:
[MATH] Discount = salePrice x couponPercentage (BL-CART-003: coupon applies to effective price)
[MATH] Cart total reflects: salePrice - discount + shipping + tax
[STATE] Coupon does NOT calculate discount from list price when sale price is active
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] addCoupon mutation response discountTotal consistent with salePrice x percentage; no errors[]
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during coupon application with sale price product
Failure_Signals: discount calculated from list price instead of sale price (BL-CART-003 violation); discount amount larger than expected (list price base used); cart total incorrect
Cleanup: Remove applied coupon; navigate away from cart

Title: Cart Sidebar — Only Best Coupon Discount Applied When Multiple Applied (BL-CART-009 Radio Policy)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- At least 1 product in cart
- At least 2 different public coupon codes available in sidebar preset cards
- Store uses BestReward promotion policy (radio-button: only best discount wins)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to cart page at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] Apply coupon {{coupon1}} via preset card Apply button
[WAIT] Wait for discount to apply
[ASSERT] Verify discount from {{coupon1}} is applied; note the discount amount D1
[ACT] Apply coupon {{coupon2}} via preset card Apply button (if second apply is allowed by UI)
[WAIT] Wait for cart recalculation
[ASSERT] Verify final discount reflects only the better of D1 or D2 (BL-CART-009: best-reward policy)
[ASSERT] Verify the cart does not double-stack both discounts
Assertions:
[MATH] Final discount = max(D1, D2) — only the larger discount is applied under BestReward policy
[STATE] BL-CART-009: BestRewardPromotionPolicy selects the single highest-value reward; both coupons do not stack
[STATE] If store uses AllRewards policy, both discounts stack — note which policy is active in the test environment
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] Cart GraphQL response discountTotal consistent with best-reward calculation; no errors[]
[CONSOLE] no JS errors when applying a second coupon to a cart that already has one applied
Failure_Signals: both coupons stack beyond BestReward policy (BL-CART-009 violation — only if store uses BestReward); second coupon application throws unhandled error; discount total drops to 0 after second coupon applied; cart total increases after second coupon
Cleanup: Remove all applied coupons; navigate away from cart
